description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:14.18.1-alpine Docker image and caching the .yarn/cache/, .yarn/unplugged/ and .yarn/build-state.yml paths. Define a single job named ci (default stage) that runs apk add --no-cache git make python3 util-linux, then yarn install --immutable, yarn build, and yarn dlx git-is-clean. Configure the job to publish any files matching dist/plain_text_linker-*.zip as artifacts. No additional services or rules are required, so the job runs on all pipelines.
